chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.65 of 2023 Saad Ikramullah Khan Niazi Versus Pak Telecom Mobil Ltd. & another Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection/reply ‘A’ 2. For order son CMA 3637/23 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA 3638/23 Dated: 20.05.2024 None present. -.-.- Appellant and his counsel were called absent on 11.09.2023 followed by their absence on 01.02.204. Today is the third date of hearing when they are called absent. There is no intimation either. Instant Appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
